original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch in blue ink on the lower half of the typed page. On the left, a rough circle labeled "Top / Very Bright / like Silver or / mirror." In the center, the text "Direction of travel: -> -> ->" with arrows pointing right. Below this, a handwritten note reads "appeared Black / outline as above / against snow of / Mt. Rainier." On the right, a long, thin, elliptical shape is labeled "Side View (Black) / Color." Above this, text reads "(no smoke trails / or vapor trails) / one looked / like this the / second from last / of the formation / Seemed a little smaller". A small bracket is drawn next to this text. At the bottom center, a large red stamp reads "COPY".

elements.description: Hand-drawn sketch in blue ink featuring a large circle labeled 'Top very Bright like Silver or mirror'. Arrows indicate 'Direction of travel'. A smaller crescent shape is drawn to the right, labeled 'one looked like this the second from last of the formation Seemed a little smaller'. A long, thin oval at the bottom is labeled 'Side Views (black) color'. Handwritten notes around the sketch include '(No Smoke trails or Vapour trails)' and 'appeared Black outline is above against snow of Mt Rainier'. The word 'COPY' is stamped in red outline text over the bottom of the sketch.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main sketch elements (circle, arrows, oval, handwritten notes, red COPY stamp), though Description A provides more precise spatial layout details and some quoted text differs slightly in wording (e.g. 'outline as above' vs 'outline is above', 'Side View (Black) / Color' vs 'Side Views (black) color').
